mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (name, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, CASE WHEN description = 'N/A' THEN NULL ELSE description END as description, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, CASE WHEN description = 'N/A' THEN NULL ELSE description END as description, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE name = #{name}

SELECT id, name, CASE WHEN description = 'N/A' THEN NULL ELSE description END as description, created_at, updated_at FROM products
name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, name, CASE WHEN description = 'N/A' THEN NULL ELSE description END as description, created_at, updated_at FROM products ORDER BY id DESC
